subcodes.title: Ziyarat for the first and last to believe, on Friday
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! I bear witness unto Thee in this hour of Friday, and so too doth every thing, that verily Thou art God, there is no God but Thee, alone, without partner [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لاشهدنک حینئذ یوم الجمعه ثم کل شیء علی انک انت الله لا اله الا انت وحدک لاشریک
subcodes.subjects: @divine attributes are within all things; every atom, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for the Babis; people of the Bayan
